name: LinkFinder AI — LinkedIn Profiles → Full Scrape

nodes.name: Read Profile URLs from Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Sheet1 must have a column named 'linkedin_url'
Example: https://linkedin.com/in/bill-gates

nodes.name: Linkfinder — Scrape Profile
nodes.notes:
🔑 HTTP Header Auth credential:
  Name:  Authorization
  Value: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

nodes.name: Append to Results Sheet
nodes.notes:
📋 Create a 'Results' tab with headers:
input_url | name | job_title | company | headline | location | country | industry | email | mobile | website | connections | followers | is_employed | is_job_seeker | years_experience | linkedin_url
